mapper.insert: insert into community_reservation ( user_id, user_name, user_phone, reservation_type, reservation_time, reservation_status, service_address, reject_reason, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{reservationType}, #{reservationTime}, #{reservationStatus}, #{serviceAddress}, #{rejectReason}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_reservation SET user_id = #{userId}, user_name = #{userName}, user_phone = #{userPhone}, reservation_type = #{reservationType}, reservation_time = #{reservationTime}, reservation_status = #{reservationStatus}, service_address = #{serviceAddress}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from community_reservation where id in
#{id}
